title: Agent
description: An Agent persona (capability/synced) — DISTINCT from a coder (live session). Canonical hub emission: AgentRecord.to_dict(). The HS-72-01 lossy-fields finding (manual_context / use_zone_context dropped by the hub) was FIXED by Phase 77: db v7 persists both, push merges them, pull re-emits them (round-trip locked in tests/unit/test_agent_pinned_context.py).

manual_context.description: The pinned context; persisted + re-emitted by the hub since Phase 77 (db v7)

use_zone_context.description: Per-device zone-context hint; persisted + re-emitted by the hub since Phase 77 (db v7)
